title: Gentianodes amplicrater

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as indigestion, diarrhea, and respiratory infections.
